title: Buyer_Median go-live + min-n read gate + 48227 cleanup
summary: Buyer_Median_ZIP store go-live behind BUYER_MEDIAN_LIVE. Added the compCount>=20 min-n read gate to track-aware-underwrite (the same gate DD-3 uses) so no path can read a sub-threshold or stale median as a buyer ceiling. Deleted the stale 48227 flipper $150k resale-trap row (store 16->15).
